# TachiyomiAT

> Free manga IA translator, free manhwa IA translator, and free manhua IA translator for Android with hosted OCR, clean AI translation, monthly token plans, redeem-code activation, and APK download.

TachiyomiAT is a reader-focused Android app and hosted backend for manga translate ia, manhwa translate ia, and manhua translate ia workflows. The public website explains the service, pricing, download path, activation flow, support options, privacy policy, and terms.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://tachiyomiat.com/): Product overview for a free manga IA translator, free manhwa IA translator, free manhua IA translator, hosted OCR, and Android activation.
- [Blog](https://tachiyomiat.com/blog): Manhwa, manhua, manga translation, Android setup, hosted OCR, and TachiyomiAT download articles.
- [Download](https://tachiyomiat.com/download): Android APK download and setup guidance.
- [Pricing](https://tachiyomiat.com/pricing): Free and monthly token plans for hosted OCR and manga, manhwa, and manhua IA translation.
- [How it works](https://tachiyomiat.com/how-it-works): Checkout, redeem-code activation, device binding, OCR, and translation flow.
- [Support](https://tachiyomiat.com/support): Help for billing, activation, setup, and service questions.
- [Mihon and TachiyomiAT setup guide](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/mihon-tachiyomiat-setup): Official install guidance, hosted activation, and permission-safe setup boundaries.
- [Translation support workflow](https://tachiyomiat.com/guides/translation-support-workflow): Permission check, OCR, glossary, review, credit, and removal workflow.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://tachiyomiat.com/legal/privacy): Data processed for OCR, translation, source discovery, checkout, activation, and support.
- [Terms of Service](https://tachiyomiat.com/legal/terms): Service rules for token packs, redeem codes, app activation, and translation processing.
- [Official sources and takedown policy](https://tachiyomiat.com/legal/official-sources-takedown): Boundary for official sources, prohibited chapter hosting, and rights-holder review.

## Machine-readable resources

- [Sitemap](https://tachiyomiat.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://tachiyomiat.com/robots.txt)
- [Full LLM context](https://tachiyomiat.com/llms-full.txt)

## Crawl notes

Checkout, login, app, manager, logout, and API routes are not intended for search indexing. TachiyomiAT does not host manga, manhwa, or manhua chapters; it provides OCR, translation, activation, download, and support infrastructure for the Android app.
